# 📌 Unit of Work — MoneyLendingManager (Chit Fund Manager)
**Generated by:** AI-SDLC Units Generation Agent  
**Architecture:** Microservices (FastAPI on ECS Fargate + AWS Lambda)  
**Mobile Client:** Flutter (iOS & Android)  
**Cloud:** AWS (Single Region)  

---

## Unit 1 — Storage & Infrastructure Layer (storage-infrastructure)
**Phase:** Foundation (Build First)  

**Boundaries:**  
- Provisioning: RDS MySQL, DynamoDB, S3  
- Infrastructure-as-code: AWS CDK / CloudFormation  

**Responsibilities:**  
- RDS schema design (groups, members, auctions, payments, transactions)  
- DynamoDB table design (sessions, auction events, notification state)  
- S3 buckets (payment proofs, reports, localization, archives)  
- Database migrations and seed scripts  
- IAM roles/policies for service access  
- VPC, security groups, networking  
- CloudWatch logging/monitoring  

**Stories:** US-033, US-034  
**Dependencies:** None  

---

## Unit 2 — Authentication & Authorization Service (auth-service)
**Phase:** Core Backend Services  

**Boundaries:**  
- Identity, registration, login, token issuance, role management  
- Backed by AWS Cognito  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Registration: email+password, phone OTP, Google login  
- JWT issuance, refresh, revocation  
- Role-based access control (Fund Manager, Group Member, Bot Agent)  
- Session management (DynamoDB)  
- User profile CRUD (name, phone, language preference)  
- Multi-language preference storage  

**Stories:** US-001, US-002, US-003, US-004  
**Dependencies:** storage-infrastructure  

---

## Unit 3 — Notification & Bot Agent Service (notification-service)
**Phase:** Core Backend Services  

**Boundaries:**  
- Push/SMS notifications via AWS SNS  
- Bot automation (reminders, attendance reporting, localization)  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Push notification delivery (SNS → FCM)  
- SMS delivery (SNS)  
- Bot reminders: auction deadlines, payment due dates  
- Attendance reporting (pre-auction)  
- Auction join invites (push + SMS)  
- Payment default notifications (fund manager + member)  
- Localization: Tamil/English strings from S3  

**Stories:** US-023, US-024, US-025, US-026, US-027  
**Dependencies:** auth-service  

---

## Unit 4 — Chit Fund Group Service (group-service)
**Phase:** Core Backend Services  

**Boundaries:**  
- Group lifecycle: creation, enrollment, targeting amount, archival  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Group creation (8–15 members)  
- Targeting amount calculation  
- Monthly auction amount calculation  
- Member enrollment + role assignment  
- Track members who received auction amount  
- Payment deadline configuration  
- Group closure + archival (export to S3, purge RDS)  
- Group summary report generation  

**Stories:** US-005, US-006, US-007, US-008, US-009, US-010  
**Dependencies:** auth-service  

---

## Unit 5 — Payment & Contribution Service (payment-service)
**Phase:** Core Backend Services  

**Boundaries:**  
- Contribution tracking, manual confirmation, proof attachments, defaulter handling  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Track monthly contributions per member  
- Manual confirmation by fund manager  
- Proof attachments (text, images, docs → S3)  
- Monitor deadlines, flag overdue members  
- Dashboard: unpaid members view  
- Native phone dialer integration for defaulters  
- SMS notifications for missed deadlines  

**Stories:** US-017, US-018, US-019, US-020, US-021, US-022  
**Dependencies:** auth-service, group-service, notification-service  

---

## Unit 6 — Auction & Bidding Service (auction-service)
**Phase:** Core Backend Services  

**Boundaries:**  
- Auction lifecycle: open/close, WebSocket bidding, winner determination  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Fund manager opens/closes auction  
- Real-time bidding via WebSocket API  
- Accept/broadcast bids in real time  
- Winner determination: highest bid OR random non-winner  
- Calculate payout: auction amount − bid − manager fee  
- Record auction results  
- Pre-auction bot attendance report  
- Auction scheduling + join invites  

**Stories:** US-011, US-012, US-013, US-014, US-015, US-016  
**Dependencies:** auth-service, group-service, notification-service  

---

## Unit 7 — Reporting & Export Service (report-service)
**Phase:** Supporting Services  

**Boundaries:**  
- In-app summaries + server-side exportable reports  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Group summary report (Flutter)  
- Member history view (Flutter)  
- PDF/Excel generation via Lambda  
- Store reports in S3  
- Return presigned download URLs  
- Archived group data retrieval from S3  

**Stories:** US-028, US-029, US-030  
**Dependencies:** auth-service, group-service, payment-service  

---

## Unit 8 — API Gateway & WebSocket Layer (api-gateway-layer)
**Phase:** Integration Layer  

**Boundaries:**  
- REST + WebSocket API Gateway configuration  

**Responsibilities:**  
- REST routing to all microservices  
- WebSocket management for auctions  
- CORS configuration  
- Rate limiting/throttling  
- JWT authorizer integration  
- WebSocket lifecycle management  

**Stories:** US-031, US-032  
**Dependencies:** auth-service, auction-service  

---

## Unit 9 — Flutter Mobile Application (flutter-mobile-app)
**Phase:** Client Application (Build Last)  

**Boundaries:**  
- Primary client interface for fund managers + members  

**Responsibilities:**  
- Authentication screens (email, OTP, Google)  
- Fund manager dashboard (groups, unpaid members, auctions)  
- Member screens (groups, auction participation, payments)  
- Real-time auction screen (WebSocket)  
- Payment proof submission (text, gallery, camera)  
- In-app reports + presigned S3 downloads  
- Push notifications (SNS → FCM)  
- Native phone dialer integration  
- Server-driven localization (Tamil/English)  
- Simple, responsive UI for non-tech-savvy users  

**Stories:** US-001–US-030  
**Dependencies:** auth-service, group-service, auction-service, payment-service, notification-service, report-service, api-gateway-layer  

---

## Implementation Order

| Phase              | Units                                                                 |
|--------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **1 — Foundation** | storage-infrastructure                                               |
| **2 — Core Backend** | auth-service, notification-service, group-service, payment-service, auction-service |
| **3 — Supporting** | report-service                                                       |
| **4 — Integration**| api-gateway-layer                                                    |
| **5 — Client**     | flutter-mobile-app                                                   |
